svg.title: DevOps Project - Sequential phases overview
svg.desc: Three main phases: Infrastructure (Terraform), CI/CD DevSecOps (GitHub Actions), and GitOps (ArgoCD), with dependencies shown

g.text: Do this first — everything else depends on it

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the Terraform S3 backend and remote state setup for this project')
sendPrompt('Explain the Terraform VPC and networking module for this project')
sendPrompt('Explain the Terraform EKS cluster and node groups module for this project')
sendPrompt('Explain the Terraform databases module: RDS, ElastiCache, DynamoDB, SQS for this project')
sendPrompt('Explain the Terraform ECR repositories module for the 5 microservices')
sendPrompt('Explain how to install ArgoCD on EKS via Terraform helm provider')

g.text: One workflow per microservice, triggered on PR and push to main

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Show me a GitHub Actions job for Build and Unit Test for a Go microservice')
sendPrompt('Show me a GitHub Actions job for linting a Go microservice with golangci-lint')
sendPrompt('Show me a GitHub Actions job for SAST and SCA security scanning with Trivy and gosec, with CRITICAL blocking rule')
sendPrompt('Show me a GitHub Actions job for Docker build, Trivy image scan, ECR login and push with commit hash tag')
sendPrompt('Show me a GitHub Actions step that updates the image tag in the GitOps deployment.yaml after Docker push')
g.text: Patch deployment.yaml with new image tag
Separate repo with K8s manifests, ArgoCD watches and auto-syncs

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the GitOps repository structure with Kubernetes manifests for the 5 ToggleMaster microservices')
sendPrompt('Show me an ArgoCD Application manifest that watches a GitOps repo and auto-syncs to EKS')
sendPrompt('What does ArgoCD do when it detects a new image tag in the GitOps deployment.yaml?')

svg.text: Click any box to go deeper on that topic
